paragraphs_en: Jiangnan is beautiful,
The scenery is familiar to me.
At sunrise, the river flowers are redder than fire,
In spring, the river water is as green as indigo.
How can I not miss Jiangnan?

paragraphs_py1: máo yán dī xiǎo ，

zuì lǐ wú yīn xiāng mèi hǎo ，
bái fā shuí jiā wēng ǎo ？

zhōng ér zhèng zhī jī lóng 。
zuì xǐ xiǎo ér wú lài ，
xī tóu wò bō lián péng 。

paragraphs_en: The thatched eaves are low and small，
By the stream， green grass grows luxuriantly。
Drunk， the Wu dialect sounds soft and pleasing，
White-haired， whose parents are they?
The eldest son hoes the bean field east of the stream，
The middle son is weaving a chicken coop。
I love the mischievous youngest son most，
Lying by the stream， peeling lotus seeds。

yǐ shì xuán yá bǎi zhàng bīng ，

qiào yě bù zhēng chūn ，
zhǐ bǎ chūn lái bào 。
dào shān huā làn màn shí ，
tā zài cóng zhōng xiào 。

paragraphs_en: Wind and rain send spring away，
Flying snow welcomes springs arrival。
Even with hundred丈 of ice on the cliffs，
Still there are plum blossoms blooming beautifully。
Beautiful but not competing for spring，
Only reporting the coming of spring。
When mountain flowers bloom brightly，
She smiles among them。

paragraphs_en: White egrets fly before West Mountain，
Peach blossoms flow， the mandarin fish is fat。
A green bamboo hat，
A green straw raincoat，
In the slanting wind and fine rain， no need to return。

title_en: Moon over the River - Walking on the Yellow Sand Road at Night
paragraphs_en: The bright moon startles the magpie on the branch，
The cool wind brings the cicadas song at midnight。
In the fragrance of rice flowers， we speak of a bountiful year，
Listening to the chorus of frogs。
Seven or eight stars hang beyond the sky，
Two or three drops of rain fall before the mountain。
By the old thatched shop beside the grove，
The road turns， and suddenly a stream bridge appears。

paragraphs_en: The winding Yellow River carries ten thousand li of sand，
Waves wash and winds toss from the edge of heaven。
Now we go straight up to the Milky Way，
Together to the home of the Cowherd and Weaver Girl。

title_cnt: 卜算子·送鮑浩然之浙東
title_en: Divination - Sending Bao Haoran to East Zhejiang
paragraphs_en: Water is the horizontal wave of the eye，
Mountain is the gathering of the eyebrows。
I want to ask the traveler where are you going?
Where the eyes and eyebrows are full of affection。
Just now I bade spring farewell，
Now I bid you farewell。
If you arrive in Jiangnan and catch up with spring，
Do stay with spring forever。

xī shuǐ xī liú 。
shān xià lán yá duǎn jìn xī ，

xiāo xiāo mù yǔ zǐ guī tí 。
shéi dào rén shēng wú zài shǎo ？

xiū jiāng bái fà chàng huáng jī 。

paragraphs_en: Visiting the Clear Spring Temple in Qishui，
The temple is by the Orchid Stream，
The stream flows westward。
Young orchid sprouts at the foot of the mountain are briefly soaked by the stream，
The sandy path between the pines is clean and mud-free，
In the evening rain， the杜鹃 bird cries。
Who says life cannot be young again?
The water before the gate still flows west!
Do not sing of the yellow chicken with white hair。

paragraphs_py1: kū téng lǎo shù hūn yā，
xiǎo qiáo liú shuǐ rén jiā，
gǔ dào xī fēng shòu mǎ。
xī yáng xī xià，
duàn cháng rén zài tiān yá。
paragraphs_py2: ku1 teng2 lao3 shu4 hun1 ya1，

paragraphs_en: Withered vines hang on old trees, crows croak at dusk,
A small bridge over flowing water leads to a family's house.
An ancient road, west wind, and a lean horse.
The sun sets in the west,
A heartbroken traveler is at the edge of the world.
